description: You are a military historian analyzing the environmental conditions of Operation Neptune Spear (the Abbottabad compound raid on May 1-2, 2011). Configure Stellarium for Abbottabad, Pakistan (34.17° N, 73.24° E, Altitude: 1200 m) on May 1, 2011, at 18:00 UTC to verify natural illumination levels. Capture screenshots of the Sun and Moon showing their positions relative to the horizon and the azimuthal coordinate grid. Write a tactical illumination report to /home/ga/Desktop/illumination_report.txt including the operation date, the location, and the recorded altitude/elevation of both the Sun and Moon.
